🔍 *ENRICH REVIEW*  \[✨ ENRICHED\]

*Name:* Holy Cross Abbey
*Country:* ireland
*Region:* the heartlands
*County:* County Tipperary
*Type:* abbey
*Period:* 12th century
*Coords:* 52.63916667, -7.86805556
*Wikipedia:* https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Holy_Cross_Abbey
*Maps:* https://www.google.com/maps/search/Holy%20Cross%20Abbey/@52.641,-7.86,15z
*Main Image:* https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/4/40/IMGHolyCross_4780w.jpg/330px-IMGHolyCross_4780w.jpg
*Gallery:* 0 images
*Image Source:* wikipedia
*Has Wikipedia:* yes
*Has Google Places:* unknown
*Enrich Notes:* add source - https://holycrossabbey.ie/


*Description:*
Holy Cross Abbey (Mainistir na Croise Naofa) was a Cistercian monastery in Holycross near Thurles, County Tipperary, Ireland, situated on the River Suir. It takes its name from a relic of the True Cross or Holy Rood.

_Listing 1 of 79_
